steps.title: Find the nouns on each side of the blank
steps.content: To the left of the blank is the noun fashion. To the right of the blank is the noun designers that begins an appositive giving the specific designers' names, which then connects to the verb developed.

The appositive Henriette Nigrin and Mariano Fortuny y Madrazo is essential to identify which fashion designers are meant, so no commas are set off around it.

The other three either insert unnecessary commas that break the subject‑verb link or treat the appositive as non‑restrictive when it is required to specify the designers.

B is correct.
steps.title: Apply the restrictive‑appositive rule
